guidance: Interpret a genuinely recent, relevant marketing/software development for service-business owners: what it means and what they should do. Be the interpreter, not a reposter.
evidence_note: Only if current and verifiable from your research. Cite the source. Distinguish fact from interpretation.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'News / Industry Intelligence' was the most under-served eligible category (target 15%, recent 12%).
post_rationale: Meta's global Business Agent launch is genuine, current news untouched by this account, and reels still lead reach for cold audiences, so this interprets the platform shift through the speed-to-lead gap it doesn't solve instead of just recapping the feature.
